journal_entry.description: Purchase of machinery with installation and setup costs
journal_entry.rationale: Machinery (asset) increases by the total capitalized cost of $800,000 ($700,000 purchase + $30,000 freight + $20,000 installation + $50,000 testing). Under Canadian ASPE and IFRS, all costs necessary to bring an asset to its intended use are capitalized. Accounts Payable increases by $700,000 (liability) and Cash decreases by $100,000 (asset) for the freight, installation, and testing costs paid by cheque.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Machinery acquisition with all directly attributable costs capitalized. Debit: 1 asset increase (Machinery). Credit: 1 liability increase (Accounts Payable) + 1 asset decrease (Cash). Total debits $800,000 = total credits $800,000.
